items.title: Man Smashes Through Wall At Punxsutawney Hospital, Runs Naked Into Woods
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mexican parents criticise ending school year a month early for World Cup
items.dek: The federal government faces widespread anger for saying the school year could end on 5 June to accommodate the football tournament.
items.body: The federal government faces widespread anger for saying the school year could end on 5 June to accommodate the football tournament.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran demands guarantees for World Cup participation
items.dek: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
items.body: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
items.author: IriLine Desk
